bugs_found.description: Fresh Postgres migrations could not run because multiple SQLx migration files shared the same numeric version, blocking signed-in dashboard E2E seeding on a clean database.
bugs_found.expected: Each SQLx migration has a unique version so a fresh database can migrate and seed dashboard browser fixtures.
bugs_found.actual: Versions 202605030041, 202605040004, 202605040009, 202605060007, 202605060017, 202605070001, and 202605070006 were duplicated; fresh migration failed with duplicate _sqlx_migrations keys and stale-checksum errors.
bugs_found.reproduction: Create a fresh Postgres database, set TEST_DATABASE_URL to it, then run cd web && npm run test:e2e -- dashboard-dashboard.spec.ts before the fix.

fix_description: Renamed duplicate SQLx migration files to unique versions without changing SQL contents; dashboard signed-in E2E then passed on a fresh migrated QA database.

tested_steps: Read qa-report.json, qa-hints.json repo-003 entries, BUILD_GUIDE.md, web/AGENTS.md, repo Code tab Playwright coverage, and Rust repository API contract/security tests.
Ran mandatory Editorial banned-value scan with ripgrep-compatible syntax: no banned GitHub hex, Primer, or Octicon hits in web/src outside og CSS.

Ran make test-e2e in the default environment: 18 tests passed before unrelated repository-discussions specs failed because TEST_DATABASE_URL/DATABASE_URL is absent; repo Code tab specs require DB and were skipped in that default run.
Created fresh local QA database opengithub_qa_repo003 after the shared opengithub_identity_test database showed a stale SQLx migration checksum.
Ran focused DB-backed repository-code-overview Playwright suite: initially exposed stale API contract issue, then passed all 5 tests after fixes.
Ran DB-backed cargo test -p opengithub-api --test repository_code_overview: initially failed because commit history lacked top-level items, then passed 4/4 after restoring items.
Ran DB-backed cargo test -p opengithub-api --test repository_code_security: passed 2/2 after adding malformed watch JSON regression coverage.

Direct curl verified GET overview, refs, file-finder, contents/src, and commits?ref=main&path=src/main.rs return application/json; commit history now includes items[0].message = Initial commit as well as grouped commits.
Direct curl verified anonymous Star, Watch, and Fork mutations return 401 application/json not_authenticated envelopes.
Direct curl verified path traversal and SQL-shaped ref probes return sanitized JSON errors without stack traces or env values.
Direct curl verified OPTIONS with Origin https://evil.com does not echo Access-Control-Allow-Origin.
Direct curl verified malformed watch body with a script-shaped level now returns 400 application/json invalid_json without reflecting the script payload.
Attempted Ever CLI on the live Code tab; ever snapshot failed with Session expired, consistent with prior QA environment behavior.
Saved QA screenshot evidence from the passing Playwright run to ralph/screenshots/qa/repo-003-final-default-overview.jpg and ralph/screenshots/qa/repo-003-final-mobile.jpg.

bugs_found.description: Repository commit history API no longer returned the top-level items array expected by the repo-003 contract; path-scoped history clients saw history_body.items[0].message as null even though grouped commits contained the data.
bugs_found.expected: GET /api/repos/:owner/:repo/commits?ref=main&path=src/main.rs includes items[0].message = Initial commit while preserving grouped history output.
bugs_found.actual: Fresh DB-backed contract test found history_body["items"][0]["message"] was null because the response only exposed groups.
bugs_found.reproduction: Run env TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/opengithub_qa_repo003 cargo test -p opengithub-api --test repository_code_overview -- --nocapture before the fix.

bugs_found.description: Malformed repository watch settings returned Axum default 422 text/plain and reflected the raw submitted script-shaped enum value.
bugs_found.expected: PATCH /api/repos/:owner/:repo/watch with malformed JSON/enums returns a structured JSON error envelope without reflecting raw unsafe input.
bugs_found.actual: Response was 422 text/plain with text containing <script>alert(1)</script>.
bugs_found.reproduction: curl -i -X PATCH -H "Cookie: og_session=..." -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"level":"<script>alert(1)</script>","customEvents":["issues"]}' http://localhost:3016/api/repos/:owner/:repo/watch before the fix.

fix_description: Restored top-level commit history items alongside grouped commits, updated the frontend API type/test fixture, and routed watch settings JSON extraction through RestJson so malformed input returns a sanitized JSON 400 envelope.

functional.notes: make test passed; mandatory Editorial banned-token scan was clean; focused DB-backed repository-import Playwright E2E passed after wiring an isolated local Postgres QA database; live browser manual pass used Playwright because Ever CLI sessions expired immediately; screenshots saved to ralph/screenshots/qa/repo-002-import-wizard.png and repo-002-import-status.png.

api_contract.notes: Focused Rust import contract/security/worker tests passed 7/7 against the QA database. Direct curl verified anonymous POST returns 401 JSON, signed POST returns 201 JSON with queued import shape/statusHref/repositoryHref, signed GET returns 200 JSON status, private-network source returns 422 JSON, and malformed or missing JSON now returns 400 JSON invalid_json after the fix.

security.notes: Anonymous create is blocked with 401 JSON; credential values submitted during signed create were absent from create/status responses; private-network literal source was blocked; OPTIONS with Origin https://evil.com returned 405 without Access-Control-Allow-Origin; focused security tests verified private host normalization and request-log credential redaction. DNS rebinding/resolved private-address hardening remains a known production-deepening item from build hints, not a shipping blocker for this MVP phase.

bugs_found.description: POST /api/repos/imports returned Axum default text/plain 422 for missing required JSON fields instead of the project standard JSON error envelope.
bugs_found.expected: Malformed or missing JSON fields return application/json with an error envelope such as { error: { code: string, message: string }, status: 400 }.
bugs_found.actual: Live curl with {} returned 422 text/plain: Failed to deserialize the JSON body into the target type: missing field `sourceUrl`...
bugs_found.reproduction: Before the fix, run curl -i -X POST http://localhost:3016/api/repos/imports -H "Cookie: og_session=..." -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{}".

fix_description: Changed the repository import create route to use the shared RestJson extractor and added regression coverage for missing-field import POST requests returning a sanitized JSON 400 envelope.

bugs_found.description: The dashboard API returned recentActivity issue/PR rows, but the dashboard UI did not render a Recent activity section for those rows.
bugs_found.expected: The top of the main dashboard feed shows up to four recent issue or pull request activity rows with title link, repository, number, state badge, actor, avatar/initial, and updated relative time, plus empty-state Create repository and Explore repositories links.
bugs_found.actual: The dashboard rendered Dashboard feed events, assigned issues, and review requests, but ignored summary.recentActivity entirely.
bugs_found.reproduction: Seed dashboard_e2e_seed, sign in with the generated og_session cookie, open http://localhost:3015/dashboard, and compare GET /api/dashboard recentActivity rows to the rendered dashboard.

bugs_found.description: PUT /api/dashboard/feed-preferences returned Axum default text/plain 422 for missing required JSON fields instead of the project standard JSON error envelope.
bugs_found.expected: Malformed or missing JSON fields return application/json with an error envelope such as { error: { code: string, message: string }, status: 400 }.
bugs_found.actual: Live curl with {} returned 422 text/plain: Failed to deserialize the JSON body into the target type: missing field `feedTab`...
bugs_found.reproduction: Before the fix, run curl -i -X PUT http://localhost:3016/api/dashboard/feed-preferences -H "Cookie: og_session=..." -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{}".

fix_description: Rendered the dashboard recentActivity issue/PR section with empty-state actions and regression tests, and switched dashboard feed-preference writes to the shared RestJson extractor for sanitized JSON error envelopes.

bugs_found.description: Global search modal treated the first suggestion as selected immediately after loading suggestions, so pressing Enter could execute that suggestion instead of the default repository search.
bugs_found.expected: Plain Enter in the search combobox submits /search?q=<query>&type=repositories unless the user explicitly highlights a suggestion with arrow keys or pointer hover.
bugs_found.actual: The first suggestion was selected by default; Enter applied it, including /search?q=<query>&type=all for the All opengithub scope.
bugs_found.reproduction: Open the signed-in header search, type a query, wait for suggestions, and press Enter without arrowing or hovering a suggestion.

fix_description: Made global search suggestion selection opt-in and preserved highlighted suggestion activation; added Vitest regression coverage.

bugs_found.description: Repository issue list user filters failed when callers used an email login after users had canonical usernames assigned.
bugs_found.expected: Author, excluded-author, and assignee filters should match the canonical username and the account email so existing query URLs and @me-normalized filters keep returning the same issues.
bugs_found.actual: The list and count SQL compared only lower(COALESCE(users.username, users.email)), so email filters returned zero rows for username-backed users.
bugs_found.reproduction: Against a migrated DB, seed a public repo issue assigned to a user with username set and request /api/repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen%20filters&assignee=<user-email>; before the fix, total/openCount were 0.

fix_description: Expanded repository issue list author/excluded-author/assignee predicates in both row and count SQL to match either canonical login or email, updated DB-backed tests to assert username-shaped response logins while retaining email-filter coverage, and aligned the focused E2E label metadata step with the implemented checkbox/save picker.

bugs_found.description: The Next.js issue-create proxy validated missing titles before authentication, so unauthenticated POST /{owner}/{repo}/issues/new/create with {} returned a validation envelope instead of the required auth-wall response.
bugs_found.expected: Unauthenticated create requests should return 401 JSON not_authenticated before field validation, matching the Rust protected route and preventing auth-wall bypass ordering leaks.
bugs_found.actual: POST /mona/octo-app/issues/new/create with no cookie and {} returned 422 validation_failed with title details.

fix_description: Moved title validation behind the authenticated Rust issue-create call by forwarding an empty title when absent, preserving authenticated server-side validation while making unauthenticated create requests return 401 first.
